findings.description: The complete list of 7 sample application functions is omitted. The source explicitly enumerates: ログイン機能、メニュー機能、ユーザ情報照会機能、ユーザ情報登録機能、ユーザ情報更新機能、ユーザ情報削除機能、ユーザ情報一括削除機能. Only the covered functions are mentioned in the knowledge file. An AI answering 'What functions does the sample application have?' would lack the full picture.
findings.source_evidence:
本書で取りあげるサンプルアプリケーションは次の機能を持っている。
* ログイン機能
* メニュー機能
* ユーザ情報照会機能
* ユーザ情報登録機能
* ユーザ情報更新機能
* ユーザ情報削除機能
* ユーザ情報一括削除機能

findings.description: The automated warning 'Section count 6 < source headings 8' is a false positive and should not be treated as an issue. The 8 headings include the h1 document title (not expected to map to a section) and '主な仕様' (h2 with no standalone content — it only introduces three h3 sub-sections). Subtracting these two yields 6 expected sections, which matches exactly. No action needed.
